name: reply-io
description: Reads Reply.io legacy v1 objects and current v3 API resources; writes supported v3 mutations through the REST API.

risk.read: external Reply.io API read of outreach people, campaign, task, and email account data
risk.write: external Reply.io API mutations for contacts, accounts, sequences, templates, tasks, settings, webhooks, and related v3 resources
risk.approval: writes require explicit reverse-ETL plan, preview, approval, execute flow
